content:
## v3.0.4

- feat(mini-player): hide on scroll-down, reveal on scroll-up
- feat(about): add Made with love by Nsamba Naswif credit
- feat: add theme selector with AMOLED black to App UI settings
- fix: rebrand about page — NasBeat branding and NasTech links
- fix: wire update checker to NasBeat releases
- ci: NasTech master weekly summary bot
- ci: add NasTech dependency health bot

## v3.0.3

- Fixed playlist tap misalignment by remapping track index
- Fixed linear stacking of repeated listened songs
- Fixed shared url resolver early stage
- Search suggestion enhancements
- Stabilize playback startup and plugin
- Some localizations completion

## v3.0.1

- Fixed equalizer range to around -15db
- Fixed some migration related problems
- Fixed only 40 songs persisted after a reordering applied to the playlist

## v3.0.0

- **Local Music Support**: Introduced local music playing on device
- **New Plugin Runtime [bex]**: Rust-backed plugin system built with waclay + wasmi
- **Lyrics Viewer + Lyrics Offset**: Offset lyrics if not syncing up
- **Equalizer support**: Now available for all devices
- **Karaoke style Lyrics**: Default karaoke style lyrics player
- **Playlist ordering and pinning**: Playlists can now be pinned or reordered
- **Crossfade support**: Supported for all devices
- **Smart Replace**: Replace dead remote songs in playlists with working tracks
- **Plugin Types**: contentResolver, chartProvider, lyricsProvider, searchSuggestionProvider, contentImporter
- **Plugin Repository Bootstrap**: Hosted repository bootstrap and one-time setup flow
- **Plugin Auto-Update Pipeline**: Background repository sync with semantic version comparison
- **Country-Aware Plugin Distribution**: country_allowlist support in repository manifests
